title: You need to stream Hugh Jackman's forgotten epic that's hailed as 'simply breathtaking'

excerpt: Hugh Jackman has starred in dozens of films, but one of his lesser-known projects was 2006's The Fountain, but the sci-fi epic has now landed on Amazon Prime
